items.title: Kailera makes history with record-breaking $625m IPO
items.summary: Kailera's IPO will allow the biotech to take oral and injectable forms of its lead candidate, ribupatide, through late-stage obesity trials.

items.title: Aligos and Xiamen Amoytop sign deal for HBV therapy
items.summary: Aligos Therapeutics and Xiamen Amoytop Biotech are to develop and commercialise pevifoscorvir sodium in Greater China for chronic HBV infection.

items.title: The innovators working to make in vivo cell therapy a reality
items.summary: As in vivo cell therapies enter clinical trials, suppliers tackle the technical and logistical barriers to commercial viability.

items.title: Daiichi Sankyo and Interna partner for MNM-targeted delivery solutions
items.summary: Daiichi Sankyo has partnered with Interna Therapeutics to develop targeted delivery solutions based on molecular nano motor (MNM) technology.

items.title: Developers back Alzheimer’s drugs despite report suggesting lack of efficacy
items.summary: Cochrane’s research looked at 17 clinical trials of anti-amyloid drugs in Alzheimer’s disease.
